title: Project map
summary: The deck walks through the current authoring loop, structured editing surface, review flow, validation, and archive handoff.
note: The browser feels direct, but server-owned writes, rendering, and validation keep the loop controlled.

cards.title: Authoring loop
cards.body: Plan the deck, edit structured slides, and keep context close.

cards.title: Review model
cards.body: Use live preview, preview-only selection, and session-only candidates.

cards.title: Validation and archive
cards.body: Gate geometry, text, media, Studio layout, rendering, and the archive copy.
